sourceVersion: School Board Approved Calendars 2026-27 PDF, dated May 19, 2026
seoTitle: Pinellas County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 (PDF): Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
seoDescription: Download the Pinellas County Schools Calendar 2026-2027 PDF. View first day of school, holidays, winter break, spring break, last day, and important PCS dates.
calendarNotes: Pinellas County Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 11, 2026 and lists May 27, 2027 as the last day for students with a two-hour early release. Thanksgiving Holidays run November 21-29, Winter Holidays run December 19-January 3, and Spring Holidays run March 13-21. The board-approved calendar marks October 12, November 11, January 4, February 15, March 26, and April 23 as potential hurricane make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pinellas County Schools start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Pinellas County Schools starts on Tuesday, August 11, 2026 for the 2026-2027 school year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pinellas County Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Holidays run Saturday, March 13 through Sunday, March 21, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Pinellas County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Thursday, May 27, 2027, with students released two hours early.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Pinellas 2026-2027 dates are potential hurricane make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The board-approved calendar marks October 12, November 11, January 4, February 15, March 26, and April 23 as potential hurricane make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: Are Pinellas County Schools closed on hurricane make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: Not automatically. The Pinellas County Schools calendar marks October 12, November 11, January 4, February 15, March 26, and April 23 as potential hurricane make-up days. Families should watch PCS announcements because those dates may be used differently if severe weather affects the school year.

yearNumbers.label: Last Day Release
yearNumbers.detail: Students are released two hours early on the May 27 last student day.

yearNumbers.label: Potential Hurricane Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: The official calendar marks October 12, November 11, January 4, February 15, March 26, and April 23 as potential make-up dates.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Holidays
yearNumbers.detail: Pinellas spring holidays span two weekends and the intervening school week.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first student day remains August 11.
Spring Holidays move from March 14-22 in 2026 to March 13-21 in 2027.
The last student day moves from May 28 in 2026 to May 27 in 2027.

events.name: Last Day for Students
events.description: Students are released two hours early.

events.name: Non-Student Day/Last Day for 198 Instructional Personnel
